MeasurementToolMetadata.Instructions: For each of the following items, please rate how generally true each statement is for you.

als_1.Description: At times I feel just as relaxed as everyone else and then within minutes I become so nervous that I feel light-headed and dizzy.

Levels.0: Very Uncharacteristic of Me / Extremely Undescriptive
Levels.1: Rather Uncharacteristic of Me / Quite Undescriptive
Levels.2: Rather Characteristic of Me / Quite Descriptive
Levels.3: Very Characteristic of Me / Extremely Descriptive

als_2.Description: There are times when I have very little energy and then soon afterwards I have the same energy level as most people.

Levels.0: Very Uncharacteristic of Me / Extremely Undescriptive
Levels.1: Rather Uncharacteristic of Me / Quite Undescriptive
Levels.2: Rather Characteristic of Me / Quite Descriptive
Levels.3: Very Characteristic of Me / Extremely Descriptive

als_3.Description: One minute I can be feeling OK and then the next minute I'm tense, jittery, and nervous.

Levels.0: Very Uncharacteristic of Me / Extremely Undescriptive
Levels.1: Rather Uncharacteristic of Me / Quite Undescriptive
Levels.2: Rather Characteristic of Me / Quite Descriptive
Levels.3: Very Characteristic of Me / Extremely Descriptive

als_4.Description: I frequently switch from being able to control my temper very well to not being able to control it very well at all.

Levels.0: Very Uncharacteristic of Me / Extremely Undescriptive
Levels.1: Rather Uncharacteristic of Me / Quite Undescriptive
Levels.2: Rather Characteristic of Me / Quite Descriptive
Levels.3: Very Characteristic of Me / Extremely Descriptive

als_5.Description: Many times I feel very nervous and tense and then suddenly feel very sad and down.

Levels.0: Very Uncharacteristic of Me / Extremely Undescriptive
Levels.1: Rather Uncharacteristic of Me / Quite Undescriptive
Levels.2: Rather Characteristic of Me / Quite Descriptive
Levels.3: Very Characteristic of Me / Extremely Descriptive

als_6.Description: Sometimes I go from feeling extremely anxious about something to feeling very down about it.

Levels.0: Very Uncharacteristic of Me / Extremely Undescriptive
Levels.1: Rather Uncharacteristic of Me / Quite Undescriptive
Levels.2: Rather Characteristic of Me / Quite Descriptive
Levels.3: Very Characteristic of Me / Extremely Descriptive

als_7.Description: I shift back and forth from feeling perfectly calm to feeling uptight and nervous.

Levels.0: Very Uncharacteristic of Me / Extremely Undescriptive
Levels.1: Rather Uncharacteristic of Me / Quite Undescriptive
Levels.2: Rather Characteristic of Me / Quite Descriptive
Levels.3: Very Characteristic of Me / Extremely Descriptive

als_8.Description: There are times when I feel perfectly calm one minute and then the next minute the least little thing makes me furious.

Levels.0: Very Uncharacteristic of Me / Extremely Undescriptive
Levels.1: Rather Uncharacteristic of Me / Quite Undescriptive
Levels.2: Rather Characteristic of Me / Quite Descriptive
Levels.3: Very Characteristic of Me / Extremely Descriptive

als_9.Description: Frequently, I will be feeling OK but then I suddenly get so mad that I could hit something.

Levels.0: Very Uncharacteristic of Me / Extremely Undescriptive
Levels.1: Rather Uncharacteristic of Me / Quite Undescriptive
Levels.2: Rather Characteristic of Me / Quite Descriptive
Levels.3: Very Characteristic of Me / Extremely Descriptive

als_10.Description: Sometimes I can think clearly and concentrate well one minute and then the next minute I have a great deal of difficulty concentrating and thinking clearly.

Levels.0: Very Uncharacteristic of Me / Extremely Undescriptive
Levels.1: Rather Uncharacteristic of Me / Quite Undescriptive
Levels.2: Rather Characteristic of Me / Quite Descriptive
Levels.3: Very Characteristic of Me / Extremely Descriptive

als_11.Description: There are times when I am so mad that I can barely stop yelling and other times shortly afterwards when I wouldn't think of yelling at all.

Levels.0: Very Uncharacteristic of Me / Extremely Undescriptive
Levels.1: Rather Uncharacteristic of Me / Quite Undescriptive
Levels.2: Rather Characteristic of Me / Quite Descriptive
Levels.3: Very Characteristic of Me / Extremely Descriptive

als_12.Description: I switch back and forth between being extremely energetic and having so little energy that it's a huge effort just to get where I'm going.

Levels.0: Very Uncharacteristic of Me / Extremely Undescriptive
Levels.1: Rather Uncharacteristic of Me / Quite Undescriptive
Levels.2: Rather Characteristic of Me / Quite Descriptive
Levels.3: Very Characteristic of Me / Extremely Descriptive

als_13.Description: There are times when I feel absolutely wonderful about myself but soon afterwards I often feel that I am just about the same as everyone else.

Levels.0: Very Uncharacteristic of Me / Extremely Undescriptive
Levels.1: Rather Uncharacteristic of Me / Quite Undescriptive
Levels.2: Rather Characteristic of Me / Quite Descriptive
Levels.3: Very Characteristic of Me / Extremely Descriptive

als_14.Description: There are times when I'm so mad that my heart starts pounding and/or I start shaking and then shortly afterwards I feel quite relaxed.

Levels.0: Very Uncharacteristic of Me / Extremely Undescriptive
Levels.1: Rather Uncharacteristic of Me / Quite Undescriptive
Levels.2: Rather Characteristic of Me / Quite Descriptive
Levels.3: Very Characteristic of Me / Extremely Descriptive

als_15.Description: I shift back and forth between being very unproductive and being just as productive as everyone else.

Levels.0: Very Uncharacteristic of Me / Extremely Undescriptive
Levels.1: Rather Uncharacteristic of Me / Quite Undescriptive
Levels.2: Rather Characteristic of Me / Quite Descriptive
Levels.3: Very Characteristic of Me / Extremely Descriptive

als_16.Description: Sometimes I feel extremely energetic one minute and then the next minute I might have so little energy that I can barely do a thing.

Levels.0: Very Uncharacteristic of Me / Extremely Undescriptive
Levels.1: Rather Uncharacteristic of Me / Quite Undescriptive
Levels.2: Rather Characteristic of Me / Quite Descriptive
Levels.3: Very Characteristic of Me / Extremely Descriptive

als_17.Description: There are times when I have more energy than usual and more than most people and then soon afterwards I have about the same energy level as everyone else.

Levels.0: Very Uncharacteristic of Me / Extremely Undescriptive
Levels.1: Rather Uncharacteristic of Me / Quite Undescriptive
Levels.2: Rather Characteristic of Me / Quite Descriptive
Levels.3: Very Characteristic of Me / Extremely Descriptive

als_18.Description: At times I feel that I'm doing everything at a slow pace but then soon afterwards I feel that I'm no more slowed down than anyone else.

Levels.0: Very Uncharacteristic of Me / Extremely Undescriptive
Levels.1: Rather Uncharacteristic of Me / Quite Undescriptive
Levels.2: Rather Characteristic of Me / Quite Descriptive
Levels.3: Very Characteristic of Me / Extremely Descriptive

als_score_avg.Description: ALS-18 mean score: mean of the 18 items als_1-als_18 (each 0-3). n/a if any item is missing.
